author: jochembrouwer
content:
So a random thought here, since we introduce https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7778 (block gas accounting without refunds) for that part we could re-raise the max refund quotient again https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-3529 as any spent gas unit cannot be refunded in the sense that we can use a gas unit multiple times for execution.

Raising the cap could make gas tokens effective again (which we obv. do not want)

It feels like the refunds are a bit unfair with this 1/5 max cap. If you would send a EIP-7702 delegation to an already existing account (e.g. the current account) while targeting an account without code, the 12.5k refund would only be partially given. Total gas spent: 21k + 25k = 46k, max refund 46k/5 = 9200, so this is 3300 gas "lost" (thus: always also start executing some code to ensure that all gas tokens are spent, and not wasted on non-refunded refunds.

Could maybe think in EIP-8037 a bit about this also 🤔
